ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Geographical subregion of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on health */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last data update for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data */,
  "doses_administered_per_100" REAL /* Number of doses administered per 100 people */,
  "total_doses_administered" TEXT /* Total number of doses administered */,
  "percent_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "percent_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "total_vaccination_centers" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccination centers in the country */,
  "total_vaccination_records" INTEGER /* Total number of individual vaccination records */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the statistics */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Rating indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vaccine (e.g., mRNA, viral vector) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was approved for use */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the vaccine */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the vaccine in days */,
  "doses_per_vial" INTEGER /* Number of doses per vial */,
  "adverse_effects" TEXT /* Common adverse effects of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine distributed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country receiving the vaccine */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was distributed */,
  "quantity_distributed" TEXT /* Quantity of doses distributed */,
  "distribution_method" TEXT /* Method of distribution (e.g., air, sea, land) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery to the country */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery to the country */,
  "distribution_cost" REAL /* Cost of distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distribution_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distribution_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_administration" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration event */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine administered */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the vaccine was administered */,
  "admin_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  "quantity_administered" TEXT /* Quantity of doses administered */,
  "admin_method" TEXT /* Method of administration (e.g., injection, nasal spray) */,
  "admin_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the country (e.g., city, region) */,
  "admin_by" INTEGER /* ID of the health authority that administered the vaccine */,
  "admin_cost" REAL /* Cost of administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_admin_by FOREIGN KEY ("admin_by") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center (number of people per day) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vaccination center */,
  "center_type" TEXT /* Type of center (e.g., hospital, clinic, mobile unit) */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members at the center */,
  "administered_vaccine_ids" TEXT /* IDs of vaccines administered at the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine administered */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination center */,
  "admin_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (1, 2, etc.) */,
  "admin_by" INTEGER /* ID of the health authority that administered the vaccine */,
  "admin_method" TEXT /* Method of administration (e.g., injection, nasal spray) */,
  "admin_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the country (e.g., city, region) */,
  "adverse_effects_reported" TEXT /* Any adverse effects reported by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_admin_by FOREIGN KEY ("admin_by") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the patient is from */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the health authority operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the health authority */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the health authority was established */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the health authority */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_authorities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, international organization) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data source (e.g., national, regional, city) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the data (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, health official, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user during the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
